OverviewThis Privacy Policy describes the information collected by Premium Software (Гўв‚¬ЛњweГўв‚¬в„ў,Гўв‚¬в„ўusГўв‚¬в„ў, Гўв‚¬ЛњourГўв‚¬в„ў) through our mobile applications, website and realted services and how we use that information.		By accessing and/or using this or any affiliated websites or mobile applications, you are agreeing to the policies and practices described in this Privacy Policy.

Information Collection and UseWhen you download and use our mobile applications, we don't require you to provide any information and we don't collect any user provided information, but app does use third-party services that may collect certain information automatically, in accordance with the following privacy policy.In other words, we don't collect information such as your full name, address, phone number or email address.

ident_heading: We DonГўв‚¬в„ўt Collect Information of Children
heading_content_part: We DonГўв‚¬в„ўt Collect Information of ChildrenOur website and mobile applications comply with the ChildrenГўв‚¬в„ўs Online Privacy Protection Act. We donГўв‚¬в„ўt knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13, and if in the event that a user identifies himself or herself as a child under the age of 13 through a support request, we will not collect, store or use, and will delete in a secure manner, any personal information of such user.
Location InformationWe don't use or collect your precise geographic location.

Sharing of informationWe don't share personally identifiable information (such as name, address, email or phone) with other companies.We don't share other information collected automatically with anyone except as described in this Privacy Policy.

AnalyticsWe collect some anonymous usage information to help us improve our apps. We use third party analytics services (Google Analytics for Firebase, Firebase Crashlytics) that may collect data as a device type and OS, an app identifier, unique device identifiers, app session time, events and lengths.

Google Analytics for Firebase (Google Inc.)Google Analytics uses the data to provide analytics and attribution information. The precise information collected can vary by the device and environment. For more information seeData collection.Analytics collected: Certain advertising identifier associated data (e.g., Identifier for Vendors, AndroidГўв‚¬в„ўs Advertising ID) and retains aggregate reporting without automatic expiration.Place of processing: USA Гўв‚¬вЂњPrivacy Policy

Firebase Crashlytics (Google Inc.)Firebase Crashlytics uses crash stack traces to associate crashes with a project, send email alerts to project members and display them in the Firebase Console, and help Firebase customers debug crashes. It uses Instance IDs to measure the number of users impacted by a crash and minidump data to process NDK crashes. The minidump data is stored while the crash session is being processed and then discarded.
Data collected: Crash stack traces, extracted minidump data, and associated identifiers (including Instance IDs).Place of processing: USA Гўв‚¬вЂњPrivacy Policy

AdvertisingThese services allow User Data to be utilized for advertising communication purposes displayed in the form of banners and other advertisements on this Application, possibly based on User interests.This does not mean that all Personal Data are used for this purpose. Information and conditions of use are shown below.
AdMob (AdMob Google Inc.)AdMob is an advertising service provided by AdMob Google Inc.AdMob collected: Cookie and Usage data.Place of processing: USA Гўв‚¬вЂњPrivacy Policy
Unity Ads (Unity Technologies)Unity Ads is a video advertising network.Unity Ads collected: Cookie and Usage data.Place of processing: Unity Technologies Гўв‚¬вЂњPrivacy Policy
Liftoff (Liftoff Mobile, Inc.)Liftoff is a mobile advertising company.Liftoff collected: Certain device information.Place of processing: Liftoff Гўв‚¬вЂњPrivacy Policy

Facebook Audience NetworkFacebook Audience Network is an advertising network.Facebook Audience Network collected: Certain information about the End Users and their devices.Place of processing: Facebook Гўв‚¬вЂњPrivacy Policy

ApplovinAd revenues depend on how well the underlying technology serves developerГўв‚¬в„ўs users. ThatГўв‚¬в„ўs what sets AppLovin apart. Their marketing platform and advanced optimization algorithms deliver real results.Place of processing: Applovin -Privacy Policy

What are my opt-out rights?Opt-out of all information collection by uninstalling the Application: You can stop all collection of information by our apps and games easily by uninstalling them. You may use the standard uninstall processes which may be available as part of your mobile device or via the mobile application marketplace or network.

Opt-out from the use of information to serve targeted advertising by advertisers and/or third party network advertisers: you may at any time opt-out from further allowing us to have access to your location data by:Following the third party instructions directly:For Google (AdMob) please visithttps://www.google.com/ads/preferences/html/mobile-about.html;For AppLovin please visithttps://www.applovin.com/optout.

Log DataWe want to inform you that whenever you use our Service, in a case of an error in the app we collect data and information (through third-party products) on your phone called Log Data. This Log Data may include information such as your device Internet Protocol (Гўв‚¬Е“IPГўв‚¬Вќ) address, device name, operating system version, the configuration of the app when utilizing our Service, the time and date of your use of the Service, and other statistics.

CookiesCookies are files with a small amount of data that are commonly used as anonymous unique identifiers. These are sent to your browser from the websites that you visit and are stored on your device's internal memory.This Service does not use these Гўв‚¬Е“cookiesГўв‚¬Вќ explicitly. However, the app may use third-party code and libraries that use Гўв‚¬Е“cookiesГўв‚¬Вќ to collect information and improve their services. You have the option to either accept or refuse these cookies and know when a cookie is being sent to your device. If you choose to refuse our cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of this Service.

SecurityWe value your trust in providing us your Personal Information, thus we are striving to use commercially acceptable means of protecting it. But remember that no method of transmission over the internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure and reliable, and we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

Links to Other SitesThis Service may contain links to other sites. If you click on a third-party link, you will be directed to that site. Note that these external sites are not operated by us. Therefore, we strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of these websites. We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites or services.
